questionText: Does your organization have an environmental policy that addresses environmental issues?
questionKo: 조직 내에 환경이슈를 다루는 환경 정책이 있습니까 ?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Biodiversity - Mines, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp:
An environmental policy is a key governance tool which serves as a foundation to drive action while ensuring accountability. Setting a corporate environmental policy for environmental issues indicates that the organization understands their importance and recognizes its responsibility in taking environmental action. 
Therefore, data users wish to know that organizations have articulated and documented a policy that acknowledges the organization's dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities associated with environmental issues, and have clear intentions and direction for action. For accountability to the organization's stakeholders, the policy should be publicly available.

columns.text: Does your organization have any environmental policies?
options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
columns.textKo: 귀사는 하나 이상 environmental policies을/를 보유하고 있습니까?
optionsKo: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years

columns.text: Primary reason for not having an environmental policy
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 for not having an environmental 정책
optionsKo: 부족 internal resources, capabilities, 또는 expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant 또는 not 관련

columns.text: Explain why you do not have an environmental policy
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 you do not have an environmental 정책

guidance.text:
Does your organization have any environmental policies? (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization addresses environmental issues anywhere within your policy framework. It may be a stand-alone policy document (regardless of the title), or another equivalent set of documents that includes policies addressing environmental issues relevant to your organization. For example, some organizations may have an overarching ‘environmental' or ‘sustainability policy', while others may have policies specific to particular environmental issues, e.g., ‘forests policy'.
Explain why you do not have an environmental policy (column 2) 
This column is only presented if you select either of the "No" options in column 1 "Does your organization have any environmental policies?".
Briefly explain the primary reason selected in column 2 "Primary reason for not having an environmental policy", including any plans to address this in the future.
guidance.textKo: Does 귀사 have 하나 이상 environmental policies? (열 1) Select "예" 만약 귀사 addresses 환경 이슈 anywhere within your 정책 프레임워크. It may be a stand-alone 정책 document (regardless 의 title), 또는 another equivalent set of documents that includes policies addressing 환경 이슈 관련 to 귀사. For example, some organizations may have an overarching ‘environmental' 또는 ‘sustainability 정책', while others may have policies specific to particular 환경 이슈, e.g., ‘forests 정책'. 그 이유를 설명 you do not have an environmental 정책 (열 2) This 열 is only presented 만약 you select either 의 "No" options in 열 1 "Does 귀사 have 하나 이상 environmental policies?". Briefly explain the 주된 이유 선택 in 열 2 "주된 이유 for not having an environmental 정책", 포함 하나 이상 plans to address this in the future.

guidance.text: The organization has publicly available policies which address environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities related to the organization and its value chain.
guidance.textKo: The organization has 공개되어 있음 policies which address 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회 related to the organization 및 its 가치사슬.

guidance.text: Environmental policy: a statement or framework of statements which outlines and communicates the intentions and direction of an organization related to environmental performance, as formally expressed by senior management (adapted from ISO 14001:2015 ).
guidance.textKo: Environmental 정책: a statement 또는 framework of statements which outlines 및 communicates the intentions 및 direction of an organization related to environmental performance, as formally expressed by 고위 경영진 (adapted from ISO 14001:2015).

simpleHelpKo: An environmental 정책 is a key 거버넌스 tool which serves as a foundation to drive action while ensuring accountability. Setting a corporate environmental 정책 for 환경 이슈 indicates that the organization understands their importance 및 recognizes its responsibility in taking environmental action. Therefore, 데이터 사용자 wish to know that organizations have articulated 및 documented a 정책 that acknowledges the 조직의 dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 associated with 환경 이슈, 및 have clear intentions 및 direction for action. For accountability to the 조직의 이해관계자, the 정책 해야 합니다 be 공개되어 있음.
